## Critical Path

{{S1 вҶ’ S3 вҶ’ S5}} ({{estimated duration}})

## Definition of Done

<!-- When is this delivery plan complete? Not per-story, but the whole thing. -->

- [ ] All Must Have stories complete and accepted
- [ ] All acceptance criteria passing
- [ ] PRD success criteria measurable (instrumentation in place)
- [ ] Knowledge graph updated with final feature statuses
- [ ] Stakeholder sign-off (if required)
